name: HealthCheck
description: System HealthCheck — URL monitoring, uptime SLA tracking, health probes, and monthly uptime reports with planned downtime integration.

features: Live health probe dashboard for all monitored URLs
Configurable background poller with per-minute polling
User-defined monitoring URLs with custom categories
HTTP status code and optional text match verification
Monthly uptime SLA report with planned downtime exclusion
Poll verification — expected vs actual polls per month
Unplanned downtime detection and DataGrid view
Planned downtime sync from ServiceNow Change/ITASK
Poller status monitoring — running/paused, poll counts
moduleDetails.author: PulseOps Team
